brandStatement: Born from the northern seas and Finnish craftsmanship, Nordic Fish Jewelry delivers timeless design inspired by the textures of nature and the beauty of imperfection.

about.intro:
We are Anne and Ari. We design and create unique jewelry from the skins of Baltic Sea fish. Each piece is a one-of-a-kind work of art—crafted from rare materials, guided by sustainable values, and finished with meticulous care. We don't create mass products, but meaningful pieces with a story.

By giving new life to fish skins, we transform overlooked materials into timeless jewelry defined by Nordic aesthetics, natural uniqueness, and refined design.

Our jewelry is more than an accessory—it is a statement for a more conscious kind of beauty.

craftingProcess.title: CRAFTING PROCESS
craftingProcess.text: The creation of our jewelry is a precise handcrafted process from beginning to end. Working with fish leather is the most demanding stage, where every detail influences the final result. The leather undergoes a careful drying and treatment process that enhances its natural texture and durability. Each step is done by hand, respecting the uniqueness of the material. The finished fish leather is cut with scissors into shapes that fit the jewelry base — a task that requires exceptional precision and a steady hand. The leather is then carefully attached to the chosen base. In the final stage, the piece is coated with resin, which protects it and enhances the leather's natural, vibrant surface. The result is a durable, luminous piece of jewelry that carries the unique imprint of nature.

sustainability.title: SUSTAINABILITY
sustainability.text: At Nordic Fish Jewelry, sustainability is at the heart of everything we do. By upcycling fish skins from the food industry, we give new life to materials that would otherwise be discarded. Each piece tells a story of environmental consciousness and Finnish innovation. Our commitment to sustainable practices extends throughout our entire production process, from sourcing to packaging.

anne.name: ANNE
anne.bio: Anne is the creative force behind Nordic Fish Jewelry. With a passion for sustainable design and Finnish craftsmanship, she transforms fish skins into beautiful, wearable art. Her background in design and deep connection to Nordic nature inspire each unique piece.

arska.name: ARI
arska.bio: Arska brings expertise in traditional Finnish fishing and material preparation. His knowledge of fish species and skin characteristics ensures that only the finest materials are selected for our jewelry. Together with Anne, he continues a family tradition of respecting nature.
